title: Four for a slow week
intro: Not much happened, which is exactly the kind of week these songs are built for. Headphones on, dishes done slowly, the good kind of nothing.

songs.title: Bags
songs.review: Three years on and the bridge still gets me every time. Bedroom-pop that earns its restraint.

songs.title: Two Weeks
songs.review: Those staccato keys are pure muscle memory at this point. A perfect song, and I won't be taking questions.

songs.title: Redbone
songs.review: Smooth as ever and that bass still talks — but I put it on once this week and didn't reach for it again.

songs.title: Motion Sickness
songs.review: Anger and tenderness in the same breath. I keep finding new lines to underline.
